workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; Fawn uses deferred queue sync to avoid per-command wait inflation at tiny payload size while preserving per-upload timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict upload comparability mode: run 500 uploads per sample, no ignore-first adjustment, submitEvery=1 on both sides, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation while preserving per-upload normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict upload comparability mode: run 500 uploads per sample, no ignore-first adjustment, submitEvery=1 on both sides, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation while preserving per-upload normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict upload comparability mode: run 100 uploads per sample, no ignore-first adjustment, submitEvery=1 on both sides, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation while preserving per-upload normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict upload comparability mode: run 50 uploads per sample, no ignore-first adjustment, submitEvery=1 on both sides, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation while preserving per-upload normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict upload comparability mode: run 50 uploads per sample, no ignore-first adjustment, submitEvery=1 on both sides, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step; Dawn divides internally by iterationsPerStep=100, Fawn divides via leftTimingDivisor.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only on Metal for now: this lane intermittently reports execution errors/timeouts on the Doe side in this host class, so it is excluded from strict comparable/claim lanes until stability is restored.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf already reports per-dispatch metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn executes repeat=100 and divides by leftTimingDivisor=100 to match per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf already reports per-dispatch metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn executes repeat=100 and divides by leftTimingDivisor=100 to match per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (workgroupshared swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=WorkgroupShared, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only on Metal for now: this lane currently exhibits intermittent native execution timeout/error behavior under both deferred and per-command queue sync on this host, so it is excluded from strict comparable/claim lanes until stability is restored.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf already reports per-dispatch metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn executes repeat=100 and divides by leftTimingDivisor=100 to match per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute pipeline creation + dispatch shape against Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant, including 50-dispatch step normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn reports per-iteration metrics with iterationsPerStep=50; Fawn kernel dispatch repeats 50 and normalizes to per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: render draw throughput
workloads.description: Native render/draw throughput workload aligned to Dawn DrawCallPerf base variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Both sides execute DrawCallPerf-style draw-call throughput against a 64x64 render target with static pipeline and bind-group defaults.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn render_draw normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render draw state/bindings
workloads.description: Render-pass state and bind-group benchmark using explicit viewport/scissor/blend/stencil + dynamic bind offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn command stream normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings
workloads.description: Render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf RedundantPipeline_RedundantBindGroups variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf redundant-pipeline variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn repeats the redundant-pipeline command stream 10x and normalizes to per-draw units to reduce sample-tail setup jitter.

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic bind-group offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic pipeline+bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic pipeline and dynamic bind-group updates.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicPipeline_DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf dynamic-pipeline render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: draw indexed render proxy
workloads.description: Indexed draw-call throughput benchmark using command-provided index buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only draw-indexed proxy. Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicVertexBuffer as the nearest proxy; not strict apples-to-apples.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Both sides report per-draw throughput units; Fawn issues indexed draws and Dawn uses the closest draw-call throughput proxy variant. Repeat=10 plus deferred queue sync reduces per-sample setup/sync overhead while preserving per-draw normalization.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn-side draw-indexed variant and command-shape normalization are contract-equivalent.

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster
workloads.description: Texture/raster workload combining texture-sampling compute with a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 with per-iteration normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf reports per iteration (iterationsPerStep=50); Fawn repeats the combined compute+render path 500 times, disables kernel GPU timestamp queries for this lane (`--gpu-timestamp-mode off`), and normalizes to per-iteration units.

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark covering sampler creation, queue write texture, texture query assertions, and resource destroy lifecycle.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 while Fawn runs explicit sampler/write/query/destroy + raster command stream; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to reduce per-command wait outliers.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Fawn command stream executes sampler/texture lifecycle calls plus render draws; repeat=10 with deferred queue sync and per-iteration normalization reduce fixed setup/sync skew while keeping SubresourceTrackingPerf-oriented units.

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract (mip8)
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark aligned to SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_8 with the same Fawn texture lifecycle command stream; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to reduce per-command wait outliers.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Normalized per iteration against the SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant with repeat=10 and deferred queue sync to amortize fixed setup/sync overhead.

workloads.name: async pipeline diagnostics contract
workloads.description: Async diagnostics benchmark covering async render pipeline creation, error scopes, and shader compilation info.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples only: Fawn repeats async diagnostics command and normalizes by async sub-steps to reduce fixed process/setup skew.

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for adapter/device/instance capability introspection and free-members lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P1 capability contract: normalize as a per-command introspection sequence.

workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for Dawn ResourceTable and immediates APIs with explicit feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P1 resource-table contract: normalize by command-sequence sub-steps with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for AddRef lifecycle touch coverage across core object classes.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P2 lifecycle contract: normalize by addref/release touch count within the lifecycle sequence.

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection macro (500)
workloads.description: Directional macro capability workload repeating capability introspection 500 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro capability contract: normalize per internal introspection iteration.

workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates macro (500)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro ResourceTable workload repeating resource-table/immediates path 500 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro ResourceTable contract: command-repeat=500 with per-iteration normalization and explicit feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount macro (200)
workloads.description: Directional macro lifecycle workload repeating AddRef touch coverage 200 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro lifecycle contract: normalize per internal addref/release touch operations across macro iterations.

workloads.name: render draw throughput macro (200k draws)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro render throughput workload using a 200k-draw command stream.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional macro workload: normalize to per-draw units with fixed setup amortization over the 200k draw stream.

workloads.name: draw indexed macro (200k draws)
workloads.description: Directional macro indexed draw stress using a 200k-draw indexed command stream.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro workload: normalize to per-draw units over 200k indexed draws with deferred queue sync.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable when Dawn mapping gains a contract-equivalent indexed macro benchmark path.

workloads.name: texture contract macro (500 draws)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro texture lifecycle workload with a larger render-draw phase for setup amortization analysis.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro workload: normalize to per-iteration units over a 500-draw texture lifecycle command stream.

workloads.name: p0 resource lifecycle contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples contract workload for upload-buffer resize churn plus explicit barrier submission.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples lifecycle contract: normalize per command-sequence iteration over upload resize + barrier operations with deferred queue sync on Metal.

workloads.name: p0 compute indirect/timestamp contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples compute contract workload for async pipeline creation, indirect dispatch, and timestamp/query APIs.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples compute contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional compute contract: command repeat=20 and kernel repeat=256 are normalized to per-dispatch units (20*256).

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples render-pass workload focused on occlusion/timestamp query wiring and multidraw API path parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over the render-pass draw stream.

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw indexed contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples indexed render-pass workload for indexed multidraw API path parity and query wiring.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples indexed contract. Dawn DrawCallPerf now includes DynamicVertexBuffer_DrawIndexed coverage, so filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples indexed render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over indexed draw stream.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier contract
workloads.description: Directional P0 contract workload for pipeline-layout/render-pass pixel-local-storage chains plus explicit barrier invocation under feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples PLS contract: normalize per barrier-sequencing sub-steps over repeated non-coherent diagnostic iterations.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier macro (500)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro PLS workload with 500 in-command iterations to stress non-coherent barrier sequencing overhead.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro PLS contract: command-repeat=500 with per-iteration barrier-sequencing normalization and explicit feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: surface presentation contract
workloads.description: Directional surface lifecycle proxy benchmark covering create/release surface path on headless adapters.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only surface lifecycle proxy. This workload is not comparable for strict claim lanes because Dawn perf coverage does not expose a matching create/release-surface benchmark contract.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional proxy only: normalize per create/release operation pair.

workloads.name: concurrent execution single-dispatch contract
workloads.description: Compute contract aligned to Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle with a single heavy compute dispatch.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape and Dawn filter mapping both exercise one long-running compute dispatch per benchmark step.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle reports per-iteration wall time with iterationsPerStep=5; rightTimingDivisor=5.0 rescales Dawn timings to per-dispatch step units for apples-to-apples comparison.

workloads.name: uniform buffer update (WriteBuffer partial single)
workloads.description: Uniform update + draw benchmark aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer Partial SingleUniformBuffer variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: per-iteration upload+draw workflow and normalization aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer/Partial/SingleUniformBuffer.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf already reports per-iteration metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn repeats upload+draw 100 times and applies leftTimingDivisor normalization only.

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: workgroup-size and iteration structure aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest already reports per-iteration metrics (iterationsPerStep=50 internal normalization). Fawn repeats dispatch 50 times and applies leftTimingDivisor normalization only.
